title: User Approval Decision for Isolation Plans

approved_resources.description: List of resource_ids approved for isolation

skipped_resources.description: Resources user chose to skip with reasons

adjusted_isolation_methods.description: resource_id -> new_method_id for any user-adjusted methods

batch_plan_approved.description: Whether user approved the global batch plan and execution order

batch_plan_adjustments.description: Any user-requested adjustments to batch ordering or parallelization

user_notes.description: Additional notes or concerns from user

approval_conditions.description: Any conditions user imposed on execution (e.g., 'only during maintenance window', 'notify team before starting')
